Reserve Bank JE Recruitment 2026 : Vacancy Details Total : 11 Post
Post NameTotal Post — RBI Junior Engineer Eligibility
Junior Engineer Civil07 — Diploma in Civil / Electrical Engineering with Minimum 65% Marks. For Sc / ST : 55% Marks. For Engineering Degree Candidates : 55% Marks Required. Diploma Holder : 2 Year Working Experience. Degree Holder : 1 Year Working Experience.
